range: ASM-2191..ASM-2196 (free range verified this tick: registry max existing = ASM-2190; `grep -c ASM-219[0-9]` in registry = 1 (that is ASM-2190 via the 2180-2190 kae-patch block); 2191+ free. Chosen at ASM-2191 per the increment-4 brief.)
purpose: SCALE-1 S1 increment-4: bounded first REAL ingest of the Wikidata 'position' non-biological domain, executed off-box on Modal CPU, validating the download->filter->type->decontaminate->emit pipeline and producing the first real chunk of typed non-bio concepts toward the domain-balanced 100k kernel. Kernel machinery, NOT a verdicted experiment. Emitted for coordinator registration; NOT written to registry by the build agent.

assumptions.claim: FIRST REAL non-biological chunk: the bounded Modal ingest of the Wikidata 'position' domain (wd:Q4164871, P279* subtree) produced 103,714 typed type-level concept records (schema kot-wikidata/1), each carrying label + P279 parents + P31 + external IDs + a ck-ufo typing block, written off-box to Modal Volume kot-scale-wikidata:/position/concepts.jsonl. This is the first real chunk of the domain-balanced 100k kernel and matches the WDQS-measured ~103,707 (ASM-2160) up to live-endpoint drift between the count (earlier) and the ingest snapshot.
assumptions.backing_ref: poc/scale/results/wikidata-position/manifest.json contentHash sha256:5ebe993d0b96a22566882356583bd1354f444c71f652bdd60bb29b1abf5ed5ad (reproducible over sorted id|ufo|decontam tuples; modulo live-WDQS drift, exact pinning = dump)

assumptions.claim: PIPELINE VALIDATED END-TO-END off-box: the full download (WDQS two-phase: 1 flat-QID query + VALUES property batches) -> filter (P279* class layer) -> type (crosswalk position terminal) -> decontaminate (exact external-ID join vs the union index) -> emit (typed records + manifest + contentHash to a Modal Volume) pipeline ran on Modal CPU (cpu=2.0) in 699.5 s wall for the full position domain; the box only orchestrated (all HTTP + processing in-container). Determinism: records sorted by QID, contentHash over (id, ufo, decontam-status). A 600-QID smoke first validated the path in 16.3 s.
assumptions.backing_ref: poc/scale/results/wikidata-position/manifest.json (wall_seconds, wdqs_pages); Modal app runs ap-F6IIEOXKu9vcJFvtPP260H (smoke) + full run this tick sha256:5ebe993d0b96a22566882356583bd1354f444c71f652bdd60bb29b1abf5ed5ad

assumptions.claim: The bounded-ingest pre-registration (docs/next/design/scale-s1-position-ingest-prereg.md) pins, before the run: root wd:Q4164871, no per-domain cap for this validation, membership K=1-with-P279-ancestry (every non-root P279* member has >=1 outgoing P279; named individuals absent from a P279* subtree by construction), the crosswalk typing terminal (position -> object/role/anti-rigid, STIPULATED, reported separately from the source-asserted P279 chain, audited by the design 4.3 human sample), and the exact-external-ID decontamination procedure against the union index. STIPULATED because roots/caps/K/terminal are build choices, pinned for reproducibility, not source truth.
assumptions.rationale: Kernel-machinery pre-registration (not a Law-1 experiment freeze): pinning roots/caps/K/typing/decontam before the run keeps the chunk reproducible and the future design-3.5 four-count interpretable, while flagging every stipulated choice for the human audit.

assumptions.claim: DECONTAMINATION RESULT (first real design-3.5 exactly_crosswalked datum for a non-bio domain): of 103,714 position concepts, 352 were crosswalk-merges against the existing 207,733-cluster union by exact external ID (predominantly P8814 WordNet-synset) and 103,362 were genuinely NEW non-biological concepts. External-ID coverage measured on the chunk: P8814=352, P686=0, P685=0, P5270=0. The very low collision rate confirms the ASM-2161 prediction that a non-bio domain barely overlaps our bio-heavy union, so ingesting non-bio domains adds near-entirely new concepts (domain-balance headroom).

GO/NO-GO for the remaining non-bio domains: the position domain (103,714 concepts) ingested off-box in 699.5 s at an estimated Modal cost of ~$0.025 (full 0.0245 + smoke 0.0006; standard-rate cpu=2.0 + <=4 GiB mem) (cpu=2.0 x 699.5 s x $0.0000131/core-sec standard + memory; measured wall, standard-rate arithmetic). Extrapolating to the vehicle (63,292) / organization (50,430) / occupation (6,616) / event / product domains to assemble a benchmark-blind ~100k domain-balanced slice: total ~2-4 additional Modal runs of similar or smaller size, estimated aggregate cost well under $5 and well inside the $0-20 standing authority. RECOMMENDATION: GO on ingesting the remaining domains off-box (per-domain, same harness), gated only on pre-registering per-domain caps so the combined slice hits a balanced 100k without single-domain domination.
assumptions.backing_ref: poc/scale/results/wikidata-position/manifest.json (wall_seconds) + wdqs-counts.json domain sizes; cost is standard-rate arithmetic [EXTRAPOLATION] on the measured wall sha256:5ebe993d0b96a22566882356583bd1354f444c71f652bdd60bb29b1abf5ed5ad

assumptions.claim: Assembling the full domain-balanced 100k rung requires the remaining-domain ingests (ASM-2195) plus per-domain caps + the 4-source census re-run over WordNet+OBO+SUMO+Wikidata to MEASURE the new biology share and the first real design-3.5 four-count; expected to drop biology share from the measured ~100% toward ~40-60% and deliver the open-domain concept coverage the KaE/F1-K n_min=240 MMLU gate needs (ASM-2055). Forward estimate pending the multi-domain assembly.
assumptions.backing_ref: resolution_path below; grounded by the measured position ingest (ASM-2191) + domain sizes (ASM-2160)
assumptions.resolution_path: Run the remaining-domain Modal ingests with pre-registered per-domain caps, merge with the existing 207,733 union under the decontamination procedure, and re-run poc/scale/src/census.ts extended with a Wikidata loader to MEASURE the biology share and the four-count; until then the 100k-balance and biology-share figures are estimates, never premises.
